close_reason: Simplified inventory closures to use ?/Ok pattern instead of .map()+as coercion
description: lib.rs:217-232 constructs Arc<FileBackend> then 'as Arc<dyn SecretStore>' / 'as Arc<dyn WritableSecretStore>'. The double-registration also means two distinct Arc<FileBackend> instances are created when a single URI is dispatched as both readable and writable. Idiomatic alternative: a single registration that exposes both capabilities (touches secretx-core; tracked at avkc.23). This is filed against secretx-file because the duplication is here, but the fix lives in core. Not blocking — current code is correct, just not elegant.
title: BackendRegistration factory closure construction is not idiomatic — 'as Arc<dyn Trait>' coercion is a smell
